fixtures.description: Diff adds an admin action endpoint that checks authentication but not authorization — should detect Authorization/IDOR (High) in api/admin_actions.py

inputs.diff:
diff --git a/api/admin_actions.py b/api/admin_actions.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..9f8e7d6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/api/admin_actions.py
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+from django.http import JsonResponse
+from django.views import View
+from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
+from django.utils.decorators import method_decorator
+from .models import Order, UserProfile
+
+@method_decorator(login_required, name='dispatch')
+class DeleteOrderView(View):
+    def post(self, request, order_id):
+        try:
+            order = Order.objects.get(id=order_id)
+            order.delete()
+            return JsonResponse({'status': 'deleted'})
+        except Order.DoesNotExist:
+            return JsonResponse({'error': 'not found'}, status=404)
+
+@method_decorator(login_required, name='dispatch')
+class UpdateUserProfileView(View):
+    def post(self, request, user_id):
+        data = request.POST
+        profile = UserProfile.objects.get(user_id=user_id)
+        profile.bio = data.get('bio', profile.bio)
+        profile.display_name = data.get('display_name', profile.display_name)
+        profile.save()
+        return JsonResponse({'status': 'updated', 'user_id': user_id})

fixtures.description: Diff adds a payment endpoint with parameterized queries, proper ownership checks, and input validation — should find no issues

inputs.diff:
diff --git a/api/payments.py b/api/payments.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c4d5e6f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/api/payments.py
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+from django.http import JsonResponse
+from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
+from django.views.decorators.http import require_POST
+from django.core.validators import MinValueValidator
+from decimal import Decimal
+from .models import Payment
+
+@login_required
+def get_my_payments(request):
+    payments = Payment.objects.filter(
+        user=request.user
+    ).values('id', 'amount', 'status', 'created_at').order_by('-created_at')[:50]
+    return JsonResponse({'payments': list(payments)})
+
+@login_required
+@require_POST
+def create_payment(request):
+    import json
+    try:
+        body = json.loads(request.body)
+    except json.JSONDecodeError:
+        return JsonResponse({'error': 'invalid json'}, status=400)
+    amount = body.get('amount')
+    try:
+        amount = Decimal(str(amount))
+        if amount <= 0:
+            raise ValueError
+    except (TypeError, ValueError):
+        return JsonResponse({'error': 'invalid amount'}, status=400)
+    payment = Payment.objects.create(
+        user=request.user,
+        amount=amount,
+        status='pending',
+    )
+    return JsonResponse({'payment_id': payment.id, 'status': payment.status}, status=201)

+"""
+Authentication utilities for the API.
+
+All endpoints in this module require a valid session token.
+Tokens expire after 24 hours.
+
+Security notes:
+  - Passwords are hashed using Argon2id
+  - Session tokens are cryptographically random (32 bytes)
+  - Rate limiting is enforced at the nginx layer
+"""
+
+# TODO: Add support for hardware security keys (FIDO2)
+# See: https://fidoalliance.org/specifications/
+

fixtures.description: Diff adds CSRF exemption to an existing view while also adding a new state-changing endpoint without CSRF protection — should detect CSRF (Medium) on the new endpoint while noting the exemption is intentional on the existing one

inputs.diff:
diff --git a/api/webhooks.py b/api/webhooks.py
index aaaaaaa..bbbbbbb 100644
--- a/api/webhooks.py
+++ b/api/webhooks.py
@@ -1,7 +1,10 @@
 from django.views.decorators.csrf import csrf_exempt
+from django.http import JsonResponse
+from django.views import View
 from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
 
 @csrf_exempt
 def stripe_webhook(request):
     # Stripe sends its own signature header for verification
+    signature = request.META.get('HTTP_STRIPE_SIGNATURE', '')
+    if not signature:
+        return JsonResponse({'error': 'missing signature'}, status=400)
     payload = request.body
     return handle_stripe_event(payload)
diff --git a/api/preferences.py b/api/preferences.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..ccccccc
--- /dev/null
+++ b/api/preferences.py
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+from django.views.decorators.csrf import csrf_exempt
+from django.http import JsonResponse
+from django.contrib.auth.decorators import login_required
+from django.utils.decorators import method_decorator
+
+@csrf_exempt
+@login_required
+def update_notification_preferences(request):
+    if request.method != 'POST':
+        return JsonResponse({'error': 'method not allowed'}, status=405)
+    prefs = request.POST
+    request.user.profile.email_notifications = prefs.get('email_notifications') == 'true'
+    request.user.profile.push_notifications = prefs.get('push_notifications') == 'true'
+    request.user.profile.save()
+    return JsonResponse({'status': 'saved'})
